isekai-editor-delete-desc: Adds PageACL-controlled deletion with tagged delete logs and deleted-content access for archived page editors.
isekai-editor-delete-editor-history-noti: Users who have participated in editing can still view the page history content.
isekai-editor-delete-invalid-target: The specified page title is invalid.
isekai-editor-delete-permission-denied: You do not have delete permission for this page.
isekai-editor-delete-page-changed: The page changed after the deletion form was loaded. Please review and submit again.
isekai-editor-delete-permission-delete-s: Allows deleting subpages under this page.
tag-editor-delete-description: Deletion made through the Isekai delete workflow.
